string.text:
The Walther PDP, a modern German sidearm known for its precision and ergonomics, found its way into the Zone through black market arms deals catering to mercenaries and well-equipped stalkers seeking reliable firepower.
 This particular model is chambered for 9x21mm.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] 9x21mm compatible suppressor
